outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low to moderate volatility expected. Positive Total GEX (3.5B) suppresses large price swings, counteracting the heavy put skew and stabilizing prices between defined options walls.
outlook.summary: The market is positioned just below a triple-expiry Gamma Flip Resonance zone. While the extreme bearish skew and high Put/Call Ratios indicate strong pessimism, the overwhelmingly positive Total GEX forces Market Makers to sell into rallies and buy into dips, effectively trapping the price. Watch for magnetic attraction towards the 0DTE Max Pain at 692.

levels.motivazione: Gamma Flip aligns precisely across all three expirations (0DTE: 694.91, WEEKLY: 694.0, MONTHLY: 695.05). This creates a massive structural pivot dictating intraday dealer hedging flows.
Massive 0DTE Put OI (38.5k) and Volume (92.9k) establish an immediate intraday defense line just below the spot price. High Vol/OI ratio indicates active defensive positioning.
0DTE Max Pain level. With positive total GEX and spot trading nearby, market maker hedging flows will naturally exert strong downward magnetic attraction toward this level.
Heavy Call OI in both 0DTE (21.4k) and MONTHLY (49.1k). This confluence acts as a firm ceiling, reinforced by the prevailing bearish volatility skew.
